infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mansariya needs your location to show nearby buses and track your ride.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Mansariya needs background location to continue tracking your bus when the app is in the background.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Mansariya needs background location to continue tracking your bus.
